_comment: Level 1 — 'Power Up the Grid'. The signature mechanic is 'storage-meter' (see mechanic block): renewables only bank if storage has room; full storage + more renewables = curtailment (waste); a full meter can be spent on a grid-surge dash. Reaching the substation is the goal. Coordinates are illustrative — tune in-browser. Platforms use the repo's {x,y,w,h}; bounds added (the source bundle omitted it).

mechanic.rule: battery-cell grows segments; solar/wind fill them; full + more renewables = curtailment (points wasted, brief warning); spend full meter on a grid-surge dash

world.note: world visibly brightens as renewables are collected; snaps fully clean on substation flip

lines.text: Right — you must be the volunteer! We decarbonise this grid by 2030, and I cannot do it alone. Grab every solar panel and wind turbine you can find!
Offshore wind: 41% capacity factor. Beats solar — that's why it's up high. Real numbers.
Real numbers. I feel slightly less useless.
(a turbine blade sweeps him clean off-screen) WORTH ITwwww—
It'll NEVER work! I'll slap levies on your precious clean leccy — and dig up FRESH North Sea oil!
The wind doesn't even blow at night! Give UP!
...that's literally what storage is for, mate.
Don't listen to him! Make clean power the cheapest power, and his oil's worthless. Watch.
So we don't beat him with rage. We beat him with economics.
Running the numbers... optimising... optimal route found.
Whatever you are, I like you.
The little hero. You cannot switch ME off. I AM the grid.
This isn't OVER! Three more parts to your little plan — and I'll be WAITING!
Pillar one: DONE. Grid's clean. Adaptation next. Onwards, hero!
